title: FFI v0.3 tests and runtime bridge discovery fixes

source.subject: fix(ci): Path import in ffi_v03 tests and runtime bridge discovery

body:
## What shipped

Stabilizes ffi_v03 workflow flakes (timeouts, missing symbols) so export FFI coverage is reliable on main.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `f7361aa`

> fix(ci): Path import in ffi_v03 tests and runtime bridge discovery

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
